name: Scheme Settlement
description: A single government benefit disbursement event: date, actual amount disbursed, PFMS transaction reference, installment number, and discharge channel. New in v2.1.
privacy_notes: sse:governmentTransactionReference is a financial transaction ID — treat as sensitive financial record.
sse:disbursedAmount is a financial disbursement record — retain per applicable government financial record retention law.
Core Settlement fields may reference beneficiary bank account details — treat as sensitive PII per DPDP Act 2023.
